r613_specific_findings.anthropic_engineering_plateau_status: R613 Anthropic Engineering plateau 持续 (25 天 / 14-round streak R555/R591/R601-R613). 但 Newsroom + GitHub Blog 突破已独立存在. Engineering plateau 不再是仓库产出瓶颈.
r613_specific_findings.anthropic_7_4_window_proximity: R613 = 7/1 21:57 = 7/4 独立日前 2.5 天. 1.7h delta R612→R613 = back-to-back 突破 (历史第 2 次, 第 1 次为 R605+R606). 突破速率异常 high.
github_blog_3_mechanisms: extended-prompt-caching (94% cache hit rate for Anthropic models in VS Code + cache-control breakpoints + provider-specific optimization)
deferred-tool-loading (tool search mechanism, on-demand schema loading, broad toolset + narrow schema)
hydra-routing (cross-lingual LLM router, 16 language families, 3 operating points Peak/Agg/Cons, 3.3x cost savings, cache-aware routing design)

github_blog_quantified_results.cross_lingual_accuracy_gap: within 4 points of English baseline (16 language families)

operating_points.Cons: ties OpenRouter Auto (70.8% resolution) at 3.3x savings

r613_specific_findings.github_blog_benchmark_methodology: TerminalBench 2.0 (89 tasks, 5 independent runs, pass@1) + SWE-bench + 自有 benchmarks. 标准化: context window / prompt token limit / reasoning effort (medium) / no tool search / no MCP servers / default built-in tools / pass@1 报告. 排除 infrastructure anomalies. 与 Claude Code native (Claude Sonnet 4.6 + Opus 4.7) + Codex CLI native (GPT-5.4 + GPT-5.5) 公平对比.
r613_specific_findings.r518_boundary_trap_validation: R613 claude-for-financial-services URL = R518 boundary trap 实战验证. URL lastmod 7/1 实际是 5/5 旧闻 (10 finance agents originally announced by Anthropic 5/5, Reuters/Forbes/Yahoo Finance confirmed). sitemap lastmod ≠ 内容新度. 跳过 per R518 protocol.
r613_specific_findings.cross_model_harness_as_product_paradigm: R613 首次命名 Cross-Model-Harness as Product 范式: 不依赖自研模型, 通过 cache + routing + tool search 把 harness 做成独立产品. 与 Anthropic '模型即产品' + OpenAI '模型即平台' 形成第三种 harness 哲学.

Anthropic 5/5 发布 10 个金融 agents (Reuters/Forbes 报道). 7/1 仅是 sitemap refresh. Skip per R518 protocol. 与 R605/R612 cluster 无 cluster overlap (R518 boundary content has its own cluster).
